title: RP Dices
description: Simulate a dice roll, with a random result. This pack is made for role playing in Minecraft.
body:
RP Dices is a simple datapack that allows you to simulate a dice roll using a public /trigger command, with a random result. This pack is made for role playing in Minecraft, but can be use for anything wich require a random number. ## Main features - Use ```/trigger [​dice_key]``` to roll a dice - Available roll: **1d**, **2d**, **3d** (default: only 1d is enabled, see options) - Available dice: **4**, **6**, **8**, **10**, **12**, **20**, **100**. - Get sum for multiple dices rolls. - Chose dice's color to display in the chat. ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkrpd:options/get```
Patreon Supporters - **1.21.11 (30/01/2026):** Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.5 (2025-07-18):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P - **1.21.2 (2024-11-28):** Delivator, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Aidan McCreary, varinyc, Setsu-P, Maximilian Adler, ODS, Jamie B - **1.21 (2024-07-03):** 아아앨, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Aidan McCreary, Azerxim, Setsu-P, Gaming Grotto, Kobe Prokopetz - **1.20.5+ (2024-06-04):** 아아앨, EXcore, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, Setsu-P - **1.20.4 (2023-12-18):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, God Emperor Leto II Atriedes - **1.20 (2023-07-05):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Phantom-Glitch-Wolf, John Stampe, 깔수, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie - **Roll 1d 2d 3d (2022-10-03):** -
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
